payload.description:
# Feature

Split Agent Misrepresentation into decision-element scores on the SelectQuote HCS Medium-Risk scorecard while keeping the legacy score in place.

# Scenario: Composite passes when no decision element fails

Given six new Agent Misrepresentation decision-element scores exist for Copay Guarantee, Free Medication Claim, False Service Claim, Unqualified Savings Promise, Ambiguous Cost Language, and Pharmacy Confusion
When a call transcript is evaluated and each decision-element score returns Yes
Then the composite score returns Yes
And the composite explanation indicates that all decision elements passed

# Scenario: Composite fails when one decision element fails

Given the split Agent Misrepresentation scores exist
When a transcript causes exactly one decision-element score to return No
Then the composite score returns No
And the composite explanation names that failed decision element

# Scenario: Composite explanation concatenates multiple failed elements

Given the split Agent Misrepresentation scores exist
When a transcript causes multiple decision-element scores to return No
Then the composite score returns No
And the composite explanation concatenates the names of all failed decision elements in deterministic order

# Scenario: Legacy score remains available

Given the original Agent Misrepresentation score exists on the scorecard
When the new split scores are added
Then the original Agent Misrepresentation score remains present and unchanged
payload.title: Define behavior for split Agent Misrepresentation decision-element and composite scores
